description_long: This is a weathered, triangular traffic sign mounted on a thin, rusted metal post. The sign face is yellow with significant rust and grime, and it features a faded black radiation symbol, indicating a warning for radioactive hazards. The post is slightly bent, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The reverse side of the sign is heavily rusted and lacks any visible markings or symbols. The sign's surface is rough and matte, with visible corrosion and discoloration throughout. This type of sign is typically found in restricted or hazardous urban areas, such as near industrial sites or abandoned facilities.
description: A rusted, triangular yellow traffic sign with a faded radiation warning symbol, mounted on a bent metal post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow, triangular sign with a faded black radiation symbol and visible rust.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and post, with rust visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heavily rusted, unmarked back of the triangular sign and post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the sign and the bent, rusted post.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside near hazardous or restricted areas
